steps.title: Divide both sides by 5
steps.content:
Starting with $7m = 5(n+p)$, divide both sides by 5 to remove the coefficient on the right side:
$$\frac{7m}{5} = n + p$$

steps.title: Subtract p to isolate n
steps.content:
Subtract $p$ from both sides:
$$\frac{7m}{5} - p = n$$
Rearranging, $n = \frac{7m}{5} - p$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
